classifications.rationale: Explicitly requests deep stateful E2E journeys across screens, persistence, and failure boundaries.
Requests extended stateful mobile E2E scenarios spanning backgrounding, re-entry, views, and server consistency.
Requests multi-user, reconnect, and cross-client consistency scenarios beyond shallow feature checks.
Production failures despite a passing suite and a request for multi-step state-machine scenarios directly match the skill.
Explicitly asks to deepen E2E coverage with journeys, re-entry, failure edges, and business-state assertions.
Requests design of a long, stateful E2E checkout journey and its invariants.
This is overall testing strategy and CI allocation, not deep E2E scenario design.
This asks for diagnosis of one flaky test, which is debugging rather than scenario design.
This is implementation of test infrastructure for an existing smoke test.
This is code review, and the scenario design is already approved.
This requests unit tests, not E2E scenario design.
This requests API contract design.
This requests performance and load-testing strategy.
This requests security threat modeling.
This requests CI configuration for an existing suite.
This requests a shallow single smoke test, explicitly outside the skill's deep scenario scope.
This is production debugging unrelated to E2E scenario design.
This is a database migration review.
This requests acceptance criteria rather than E2E scenario design.
This requests an accessibility audit.
